prompt:
You are a PROOF-FILLER. Replace the `sorry` placeholders for the listed declarations with complete, type-correct Lean proofs. Do NOT change statement signatures; do NOT weaken hypotheses.

Lean files live under: /<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/FiniteDimL1LinfDuality
Target declarations: coeffPoly_natDegree_le, coeffPoly_eval, Ev (map_add'/map_smul'), Ev_apply, coeffPoly_eval_node, contrastL (map_add'/map_smul'), contrastL_apply, coeffPoly_contrast, Ev_injective, Ev_single, contrastL_single, le_ninf, ninf_nonneg, ninf_smul, ninf_add_le, ninf_sign, dual_nonneg, contrastL_le_dual_mul_ninf

## Instructions
Fill ALL sorries in /<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/FiniteDimL1LinfDuality/HahnBanachSetup.lean. Do NOT edit any other file. Do NOT change any public signature (statements are fixed and depended on by StrongDuality.lean); only replace `sorry`/`by sorry` bodies. If a statement is genuinely unprovable as written, make the MINIMAL fix and note it, but the intended results are all true. Build with `lake build CausalSmith.Substrate.FiniteDimL1LinfDuality.HahnBanachSetup` and iterate to zero errors and zero remaining sorries.

Context: `MomentSol`, `primalNormSet`, `dualValSet`, `dualValSet_nonempty`, `dualValSet_bddAbove`, `primalNormSet_nonempty` are in Basic.lean/WeakDuality.lean (imported). `import Mathlib` is available transitively, so `Matrix.vandermonde`, `Matrix.det_vandermonde_ne_zero_iff`, Polynomial API, `Finset.sup'` are all in scope.

Hints per lemma:
- `coeffPoly b = ∑ i, C (b i) * X^i`. coeffPoly_natDegree_le: `Polynomial.natDegree_sum_le` + `natDegree_C_mul_X_pow_le`/`natDegree_le_iff_degree_le`; each term degree ≤ i ≤ β (i : Fin (β+1)). coeffPoly_eval: `Polynomial.eval_finset_sum`, `eval_C_mul`, `eval_pow`, `eval_X`. 
- Ev.map_add'/map_smul': unfold, `Finset.sum_add_distrib`/`Finset.mul_sum`, `add_mul`, `Pi.add_apply`; ring. Ev_apply: `rfl` (definitional). coeffPoly_eval_node: rewrite coeffPoly_eval and Ev_apply.
- contrastL.map_*: same sum manipulations. contrastL_apply: `rfl`. coeffPoly_contrast: coeffPoly_eval at 1 and 0; `1^i=1`, `0^i = if i=0 then 1 else 0`; match the `if i=0 then 0 else 1` shape (contrast = value(1)-value(0)).
- Ev_injective (KEY): mirror the Vandermonde argument in Basic.lean `momentSol_nonempty`. Restrict to the first β+1 nodes `e i := ⟨i, ...⟩ : Fin (k+1)` (i : Fin (β+1)), `q i := p (e i)` injective. Show `Ev p β b (e i) = (Matrix.vandermonde q *ᵥ b) i` (note `vandermonde q i j = q i ^ j`, `mulVec` = `∑ j, vandermonde q i j * b j`). If `Ev p β b = 0` then `vandermonde q *ᵥ b = 0`; vandermonde is a unit (`isUnit_iff_ne_zero.mpr ((det_vandermonde_ne_zero_iff).mpr hq)`), so `mulVec` is injective (`Matrix.mulVec_injective_iff_isUnit` or `Matrix.mulVec_injective_of_isUnit`/eq_zero from unit), giving b = 0. Prove injectivity via `sub_eq_zero`/`LinearMap.injective` reduction to kernel-trivial.
- Ev_single ℓ j: `Ev_apply`, `Finset.sum_eq_single ℓ` with `Pi.single_eq_same`/`Pi.single_eq_of_ne`; `Pi.single ℓ 1 i * p j^i` nonzero only at i=ℓ giving `p j^ℓ`. contrastL_single ℓ: same, gives `if ℓ=0 then 0 else 1`.
- ninf x = `Finset.univ.sup' _ (fun j => |x j|)`. le_ninf: `Finset.le_sup'`. ninf_nonneg: `Finset.sup'` ≥ any element ≥ 0, or `le_trans (abs_nonneg ..) (le_ninf ..)`. ninf_smul c x = |c|*ninf x: `|c • x j| = |c|*|x j|` (`Pi.smul_apply`, `abs_mul`), then `Finset.sup'` of `|c|*f` = `|c| * sup' f` via `Finset.mul_sup'` (nonneg |c|) or `Finset.sup'_comm`/`Monotone.map_finset_sup'` with `mul_le_mul_left`. ninf_add_le: `Finset.sup'_le`; for each j `|x j + y j| ≤ |x j|+|y j| ≤ ninf x + ninf y` (le_ninf twice). ninf_sign: all `|s j| = 1` so `sup'` of constant 1 = 1 (`Finset.sup'_const`).
- dual_nonneg: `0 ∈ dualValSet p β` (zero polynomial, as in dualValSet_nonempty), then `le_csSup (dualValSet_bddAbove hp hβ) (⟨0, ...⟩)`.
- contrastL_le_dual_mul_ninf (KEY): set r := coeffPoly b, s := ninf (Ev p β b), M := sSup (dualValSet p β). Suffices |contrastL β b| ≤ M * s (then `le_trans (le_abs_self _)`). Case s = 0: each |Ev p β b j| ≤ s = 0 (le_ninf) so Ev p β b = 0, so r vanishes at all k+1 distinct nodes with natDegree ≤ β ≤ k; a nonzero such poly has ≤ β < k+1 roots (`Polynomial.card_roots`/`Polynomial.eq_zero_of_natDegree_lt_card_of_eval_eq_zero` style, or reuse Ev_injective: Ev p β b = 0 ⇒ b = 0 ⇒ contrastL β b = 0). Then LHS = 0 = M*0. Case 0 < s: put r' := (s⁻¹) • r (Polynomial `C s⁻¹ * r` or smul). For each j, |r'.eval (p j)| = |Ev p β b j| / s ≤ 1 (le_ninf); r'.natDegree ≤ β (coeffPoly_natDegree_le, scaling preserves). So `|r'.eval 1 - r'.eval 0| ∈ dualValSet p β`, hence ≤ M via `le_csSup (dualValSet_bddAbove hp hβ)`. That value = |contrastL β b|/s (coeffPoly_contrast, scaling), so |contrastL β b| ≤ M*s.

Use the lean-lsp MCP tools to check your proof (diagnostics/goal). When done, output a SHORT plain-text report: which decls you closed, which remain, and any blocker. No JSON required.
